question: Medical emergency on campus
answer: MEDICAL EMERGENCY — Call LPU Medical Centre: 01824-404-911 (24/7). Location: Block 38, Ground Floor. Ambulance: 01824-404-000. Nearest hospital: Guru Nanak Dev Hospital, GT Road, Phagwara — 3.5 km from campus. Auto-rickshaws available at main gate 24/7. Call first, then come.

question: Lost ID card at LPU
answer: Lost ID Steps: 1) File FIR at campus police post — Block 1, 24/7. 2) Visit Registrar Office — Block 32, 9AM-5PM with FIR copy. 3) Submit application for duplicate ID + Rs 500 fee. 4) New ID ready in 2 working days. Until then use Aadhaar as temporary ID on campus. Contact: registrar@lpu.in | 01824-404-105.

question: Exam emergency or malpractice issue at LPU
answer: Exam emergency: Contact Exam Controller immediately — Block 32, Exam Cell. Phone: 01824-404-200. For malpractice allegations: You have the right to appeal within 7 days. Submit written appeal to the Dean Academics. Keep all hall tickets and admit cards safe until results are declared.
